hero_subtitle: Empowering farmers with AI-powered crop price predictions, market insights, and personalized recommendations to maximize profits
feature1_desc: AI-powered predictions of future crop prices based on historical APMC market data
feature2_desc: Smart suggestions on which crops to plant based on market demand
feature3_desc: Ideal planting schedules to maximize yield and market price alignment
feature4_desc: Compare prices across nearby APMC markets to find the best selling price
feature5_desc: Interactive dashboard with real-time insights and personalized analytics
feature6_desc: Available in English, Hindi, and Marathi for better accessibility
profit_calculator_desc: Calculate expected profits based on current market prices.
seasonal_alerts_desc: Get notified about optimal planting and harvesting seasons.
demand_forecasting_desc: Predict market demand for crops to plan production.
price_alerts_desc: Set custom price alerts for your crops.
discover_text: Discover how Harvest Horizon can transform your farming experience
about_text1: Harvest Horizon is an innovative agriculture analytics platform designed to help farmers make informed decisions using data analysis and machine learning.
about_text2: By analyzing historical APMC market data, we provide accurate price predictions, crop recommendations, and market insights to maximize farmer profits.
founded_text: Founded in 2026, Harvest Horizon emerged from the need to bridge the gap between traditional farming practices and modern technology.
mission_desc: To empower farmers with data-driven insights for sustainable and profitable farming.
vision_desc: Creating a future where every farmer makes informed decisions using technology.
values_desc: Integrity, innovation, and farmer-first approach in everything we do.
tech_stack_desc: Our platform leverages cutting-edge technologies to deliver accurate and actionable insights
dashboard_subtitle: Real-time insights and predictions for your farming decisions
cta_subtitle: Join thousands of farmers already using Harvest Horizon
